headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects Virginia Democrats’ attempt to revive new congressional map
headlines.description: The decision leaves in place a Virginia Supreme Court ruling that concluded the process leading up to a referendum approving a new congressional map was flawed.

headlines.title: Election denier Tina Peters set for release after Colorado governor commutes sentence
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Jared Polis had previously called Peters’ 9-year prison sentence “harsh.” President Trump has repeatedly demanded she be released.

headlines.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a primary for the first time since his Trump impeachment vote
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s political career is at stake on Saturday as Louisiana voters weigh in on the Republican for the first time since he voted to convict President Donald Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial

headlines.title: Trump says ISIS second-in-command killed in Africa
headlines.description: President Donald Trump late Friday said that a top Islamic State group commander has been killed in Africa in a joint operation with Nigeria’s armed forces

headlines.title: Chinese young adults talk about views on America
headlines.description: While Tom Llamas was in China, he spent time with a group of students and recent graduates at a tea shop, where they spoke about issues facing today’s youth and about their views on America.

headlines.title: Trump’s high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: President Trump returned to the U.S. after his whirlwind trip to Beijing. Today he revealed more about his talks with China’s president, including on Iran and trade. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas reports.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: ‘Perfect statement’: Trump defends his dismissal of Americans’ finances amid Iran war
headlines.description: The president also said he’s not considering the political implications of the Iran war on the midterms, when Republicans will be defending slim majorities in each chamber.

headlines.title: Texas Children’s will create ‘detransition clinic’ to settle DOJ and state investigation
headlines.description: Texas Children’s Hospital must create the country’s “first-ever detransition clinic,” Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said in announcing a settlement over transgender healthcare.
